/opt/homebrew/bin/gfortran  -fPIC -O2 -ffixed-line-length-132 -O3 -isysroot /Applications/Xcode.app/Contents/Developer/Platforms/MacOSX.platform/Developer/SDKs/MacOSX26.2.sdk -mmacosx-version-min=15.6 CMakeFiles/htdp_exe.dir/htdp.f.o CMakeFiles/htdp_exe.dir/initvl.f.o CMakeFiles/htdp_exe.dir/initeq.f.o CMakeFiles/htdp_exe.dir/initbd.f.o CMakeFiles/htdp_exe.dir/initps.f.o -o /Users/xuning/Work/go-dem/libs/darwin_arm/htdp
